name: Upside-Down Onion Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 1 Sweet Spanish onion, peeled and cut into 6 very thin slices from the center of the onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 9-inch oven-proof skillet over medium heat.
2. Arrange the onion slices at the bottom of the skillet.
3. Cook the onion slices for 2 to 3 minutes, or until they are partially cooked.
4. In a bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
5. In another bowl, beat together milk, oil, and egg.
6. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients.
7. Fold in the chopped onions.
8. Pour the batter over the onion slices in the skillet.
9. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the bread is done.
10. Invert the cornbread onto a serving plate.
11. Cut into wedges and serve. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
